Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about working with SMB.

What fashion brands do you work with?
We specialize in fashion e-commerce brands doing €50k+ per month in revenue. This includes streetwear, luxury apparel, jewelry, watches, sneakers, and accessories. If you're already spending on Google Ads but feel capped by performance plateaus, we're built for you.
What service do you provide?
We handle complete Google Ads management including Performance Max optimization, Shopping campaigns, Search campaigns, and backend analytics setup. We also optimize your conversion tracking, audience segmentation, and feed management to maximize every dollar spent.
How is this different from other Google Ads agencies?
Most agencies focus only on front-end campaign management. We go deeper - optimizing your entire funnel from ad click to purchase. Our backend optimization identifies your most profitable customer segments, improves feed quality, and ensures your tracking captures every conversion accurately.
What does success look like in the first 90 days?
Success looks like a stable, scalable Google Ads system: Clear winning product categories identified, optimized feed with high-quality data, accurate conversion tracking, structured campaign architecture, reduced cost per acquisition, and consistent month-over-month revenue growth.

Show Us What You're Running.

We'll tell you what we see — the good, the bad, and what's holding you back. No decks, no sales scripts. Just an honest look at your setup and what we'd change.
